host.title: Host
host.description: The host address of your database.

port.title: Port
port.description: The port used for connecting to your database.

user.title: User
user.description: The user name for accessing your database.

password.title: Password
password.description: The password used for accessing your database.

filter_dbs.title: Filter schemas
filter_dbs.description: Define which schemas to filter. Separate them by `comma`, if more than one.

filter_tables.title: Filter tables
filter_tables.description: Define which tables to filter. Separate them by `comma`, if more than one.

cursor_array_size.title: Cursor Array Size
cursor_array_size.description: This allows fetching records in batches speeding up network traffic. Recommend a setting of 10000 records.

use_date_datatype.title: Use proper type for dates
use_date_datatype.description: Use proper types for dates instead of handling them as plain strings.

ssh_tunnel.title: SSH Tunnel

enable.title: Enable SSH Tunnel
enable.description: Enable SSH tunnel to use in your database connection.

host.title: SSH host
host.description: The host for accessing your SSH tunnel.

password.title: SSH password
password.description: The password for accessing your SSH tunnel. Use either password or private key

port.title: SSH port
port.description: The port used for connecting to your SSH tunnel. The default SSH port is 22, but your port might be different.

username.title: SSH username
username.description: The user name for accessing your SSH tunnel.

private_key.title: SSH private key
private_key.description: The private key for accessing your SSH tunnel. Use either password or private key

run_tunnel_auth_interactive_dumb.title: Enable dumb interaction on auth
run_tunnel_auth_interactive_dumb.description: Enable dumb interaction on auth for ssh tunnel

ssh_tunnel.description: SSH Tunnel to be used in your database connection

tds_version.title: TDS version
tds_version.description: The TDS version to use for the connection.

enable_tds_logging.title: Enable TDS logging
enable_tds_logging.description: Enable TDS logging for the connection.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.description: The encryption to use for the connection.

query_streams_only.title: Query streams only
query_streams_only.description: If enabled, only query streams (defined in Query Streams) will be discovered and synced. Table and view discovery will be skipped entirely.

query_streams.title: Query Streams
query_streams.description: Define custom SQL queries as streams. Each entry requires a stream name (that must be unique) and a SQL query.

stream_name.title: Stream Name
stream_name.description: Name for the stream that will be generated from this query.

query.title: SQL Query
query.description: SQL query to execute for extracting data.
